message:
test(unit): expand explanations.rs inline tests (11→49) (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Add 38 new unit tests for explanation template system covering:
- Individual template access for all deny/workflow/event/risk IDs
- Registry count verification (17 templates)
- Template ID uniqueness and sort order guarantees
- Category listing for event, risk, unknown, and empty prefixes
- render_explanation: multiple placeholders, unmatched, empty values,
  special chars, braces in values
- format_explanation: with context, without suggestions, without
  see_also, empty both, suggestion ordering, comma-separated see_also
- Serialization: JSON roundtrip, suggestions/see_also as arrays
- Static template field validation: deny, risk, workflow content
- Edge cases: partial IDs, case sensitivity, detailed text length bounds

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
